text.message: hey oj, you ok leaving me the 8 brick 3-1?
hmm could give me a nb and a wheat trade
do just a mean a wheat trade some time in the future?
said some time in the future
i said i'd do some time in future
will be hard to get an extra wheat for you oj with that block.
if you get to decide when to trade it
ok.  next time say first wheat if that's what you want
uh, don't say sorry then.  lol
crazy how am i only able to trade with the clear leader, why are you so inactive black and red?
i think you should rename yourself to : Nb?
i think red has other plans :)
